form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of six months. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at Arapahoe Park October 10 over 302m, 0.5 len behind My Purdy Baby carrying 56.5kg at $117.70. First up last campaign fifth of 9 at Energy Downs June 20 over 229m, 1.3 len behind Storm Breaks carrying 57kg at $6.20. Likely to be up for this.
